name: presentation-archive-reports
phase11HygieneFixes: Updated docs/progress/run-log.md Phase 11 commit/push status to committed and pushed as 670a516 feat: add mentor assignment workflow.

routeShapeDecision.reason: One selected-site read-only route keeps presentation, archive, readiness, summary, filters, permissions, and workspace state under a single bounded operations payload.

presentationScopeStrategy: Start from active selected-site site_users joined to active student accounts and active student role membership.
Join selected-site program/cohort membership and presentation slots only for scoped students.
Map presentation rows to canonical ready, pending, scheduled, completed, missing, outline_pending, outline_revision_needed, and attention_required values.
archiveScopeStrategy: Resolve archive rows through selected-site students instead of global archive/export data.
Include archive/export state, provider status, download readiness, and expiration booleans only when safe.
Set storageIdentifiersRedacted true and omit Drive IDs, storage IDs, full private URLs, token/password/setup credential fields, and unsafe audit payloads.
readinessReportStrategy: Use selected-site presentation blockers, archive failures, high-risk/stale/no-mentor signals, submitted/revision pressure, evidence/progress gaps, and program breakdown counts.
Return bounded attention rows plus selected-scope summary counts.
Use the same selected-site population totals as Phase 7 dashboard and Phase 8 directory.
mutationPolicy: Read-only in Phase 12. No presentation scheduling, check-in/check-out, archive retry/export, reporting export, user-management, user creation, credential creation, or fake mutation UI was added.

roleVisibilityPolicy.platform_admin: Can view any active selected-site operations; no mutation permissions returned.
roleVisibilityPolicy.admin: Can view any active selected-site operations; no mutation permissions returned.
roleVisibilityPolicy.org_admin: Can view assigned tenant site operations; no mutation permissions returned.
roleVisibilityPolicy.site_admin: Can view assigned-site operations; no mutation permissions returned.
roleVisibilityPolicy.viewer: Can view assigned-site operations read-only with mutation permissions false.
roleVisibilityPolicy.program_teacher: Can view read-only operations rows and counts scoped to teacher-visible selected-site program/cohort students.
roleVisibilityPolicy.mentor: Denied from the site operations route; mentor assigned-student surfaces remain separate.
roleVisibilityPolicy.student: Denied from the site operations route; student self-service remains /api/student/dashboard and /api/student/archive/readiness.
roleVisibilityPolicy.misc_admin: Denied from the site operations route.

workspaceChanges: Added Operations navigation section for authorized roles.
Loaded /api/site/operations-readiness with selected site and filter query params.
Rendered summary tiles, filter bar, Presentation, Archive, Readiness, Program Breakdown, and Next Action panels.

Used Figma-aligned classes workspace-operations-readiness, workspace-operations-layout, workspace-filter-bar, workspace-dashboard-card, workspace-student-row, workspace-story-chip, workspace-risk-chip, workspace-problem-state, and statusPill().
Showed read-only explanations and omitted scheduling, check-in/check-out, archive retry/export, and user-management controls.
studentDetailIntegration: Worklist rows include safe studentId values.
Rows use the existing Phase 9 openSiteStudentDetail path.
Opening and closing detail preserves Operations filter state and does not reset Students directory filters/pagination.
redactionProof: API tests and local proof scan operations responses for raw Drive IDs, storage identifiers, full private URLs, token/password/setup credential fields, and unsafe audit metadata.
Workspace source tests ensure no raw storage or secret strings are rendered in the Operations UI.
testsAddedOrUpdated: Updated tests/workspace-app.test.mjs for Operations route loading, rendering, detail action, read-only mode, and no mutation controls.
Updated tests/production-workflow-source.test.mjs for route inventory/source patterns, scoping, bounded payloads, redaction, audit events, and no mutation handlers.
localProofUpdates: Local proof covers primary selected-site summary, presentation pending, archive ready, archive failed, high-risk attention rows, viewer read-only, site-admin cross-site denial, program-teacher scoping, mentor/student denial, and no leak output.
Misc-admin denial remains covered by integration tests.

phase13Readiness.notes: Phase 13 can build the sales demo runbook and hosted proof plan on selected-site dashboard, directory, detail, review queue, mentor assignment, and operations readiness surfaces. Hosted proof still depends on remote D1 migration 0011 being available.

fullValidation: npm run check:production-surfaces passed with 91 production text surfaces scanned.
npm run test passed with 303 passing tests and 4 expected local HTTP skips.
npm run prove:demo:local passed with non-mutating operations readiness proof.
git diff --check passed with CRLF normalization warnings only.

blockers: Remote D1 still lacks migration 0011_multisite_site_role_foundation.sql, so no remote migration, remote write/seed, deploy, or hosted proof was run.
Phase 12 intentionally does not add presentation scheduling, check-in/check-out, archive retry/export, or reporting export mutations.
